## Checklist
- [ ] I created this PR from the latest `main`
- [ ] My changes are focused (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] Unity runs and I didn’t introduce new console errors
- [ ] Any asset changes include `.meta` files
- [ ] I updated docs/comments if needed
- [ ] I’m ready for Maintainer review and merge into `main`
